description: Annotate the contour lines in the TopoCal project 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\base_project.top' with their elevation values. Apply labels by drawing a line that intersects at least 5 major contour lines, ensuring the numeric elevation labels are visible. Export the resulting drawing as a DXF file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\labeled_contours.dxf' and save the project to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\labeled_contours.tcl'.
